description: Query local Safari browsing history from a snapshot index; no remote API spec.

novel_features.name: Session Timeline Reconstruction
novel_features.description: Reconstructs session-level browsing timelines from visit-time gaps and redirect chains.

novel_features.name: Derived Dwell Estimate
novel_features.description: Estimates per-domain time-on-site from visit-time gaps (Safari stores no native dwell).

novel_features.name: Navigation Graph
novel_features.description: Builds a page-node / referrer-edge navigation graph (JSON or Graphviz dot).

novel_features.name: iCloud Tabs Reader
novel_features.description: Deterministic read of synced iCloud tabs open on the user's other Apple devices from CloudTabs.db, with per-device counts (--summary), device-name/pinned filters, no-silent-cap, and an opt-in Safari-activate --refresh for freshness.
